# Stevenson vendored contract snapshots

**Canonical source:** `~/Developer/stevenson-skunkworks-ceo/packages/si-video-composition/` (TypeScript/JSDoc + `schemas/*.json`).

This directory holds **JSON snapshots only** so FeedFoundry engineers can grep manifests without adding a Node workspace dependency. Refresh manually when CEO template IDs change.

| File | Purpose |
|------|---------|
| `product_template_ids.v1.json` | Hyperframes-style template IDs for RTMR, Trenderly, and FeedFoundry lanes. |

**Do not** commit API keys or signed URLs alongside these files.
